features: LUXURY HAND WASH - Our hand soap liquid is carefully crafted, helping to deliver that premium spa experience in your own home.
UK BASED - All our products are locally produced and ethically sourced. Using +90% naturally derived ingredients, the Afina hand wash range is vegan friendly. A soap with purpose.

STANDOUT DESIGN - Our packaging will add a contemporary feel to your bathroom, while delivering spa quality products. Or, if you normally buy hand soap refill or hand wash refill, then why not try Afina?

SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES - Afina's handwash liquid soap is suitable for all skin types and is formulated with plant-based surfactants and moisturising ingredients. Can be used as an antibacterial soap.

THE AFINA RANGE - Our range covers hand wash, body lotion and body wash, with our shampoo and conditioner currently under development! Our aim is to deliver Spa quality products and affordable prices.
